title: odontites vulgaris subsp. canescens
intro: Odontites vulgaris subsp. canescens, commonly known as pale toothwort or woolly toothwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats. The herbal preparations of Odontites vulgaris subsp. canescens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used as a natural remedy for respiratory issues.
